# data/external/

Reference data from external sources (not derived from API pulls).

| File | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `sp500_constituents.csv` | Wikipedia / CRSP | S&P 500 ticker list with sector/industry |
| `fomc_dates.csv` | Federal Reserve | Historical FOMC meeting dates |
| `earnings_calendar.csv` | Earnings Whispers / manual | Quarterly earnings release dates |
| `macro_events.csv` | FRED / manual | Key macroeconomic announcement dates |

These files are committed to the repo (small, reference-only, no PII).
